disclaimer: Scores derived from measurable HTML/CSS signals (structure, tokens, motion). Full CEILING_MET requires screenshot side-by-sides vs reference exemplars + Lighthouse/axe floors.

criteria.name: visual hierarchy
criteria.description: Clear primary action, KPI prominence, section structure readable at a glance (Linear/Stripe bar).

criteria.name: typographic rhythm
criteria.description: Display + body font pairing, rem/clamp scale, consistent heading levels.

criteria.name: spacing/grid
criteria.description: Consistent padding rhythm, responsive grid, no cramped or floating elements.

criteria.name: color-system coherence
criteria.description: Theme + identity accent applied consistently; not default browser gray.
criteria.evidence: Theme declared; Theme CSS linked; Per-outcome identity accent

criteria.name: motion/micro-interaction
criteria.description: Hover/focus states, transitions on interactive elements.

criteria.name: consistency
criteria.description: Shared Forge design layers linked; shell matches identity manifest.

criteria.name: brand fit
criteria.description: Title/copy/domain align with product; no template vertical bleed.
criteria.evidence: Product name "AccessLink" in UI; Domain keywords in copy; No template bleed / dev copy
